item.title: MD Router Control [Network]
item.itunes:title: MD Router Control [Network]
item.itunes:author: md2222
item.itunes:summary:
MD Router Control
(Network)
Opens your router's web interface by one click on the tray icon. The password is saved by libsecret. After closing the interface window, checks connection to the test address and changes tray icon color.
Based on webkit2gtk.

2.1.1 - The password is saved by libsecret.
[read more]
item.description:
MD Router Control
(Network)
Opens your router's web interface by one click on the tray icon. The password is saved by libsecret. After closing the interface window, checks connection to the test address and changes tray icon color.
Based on webkit2gtk.

2.1.1 - The password is saved by libsecret.
[read more]

Opens your router's web interface by one click on the tray icon. The password is saved by libsecret. After closing the interface window, checks connection to the test address and changes tray icon color.
Based on webkit2gtk.

2.1.1 - The password is saved by libsecret.
[read more]

item.title: WholeClear EML to MBOX Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: WholeClear EML to MBOX Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ellasmith
item.itunes:summary:
WholeClear EML to MBOX Converter
(Utilities)
Use Our WholeClear EML to MBOX Converter software to convert a large number of EML files to MBOX. This program facilitates and eases the migration process for all kinds of users. Your whole data is protected during conversion by this tool. It requests your consent to save data in the location you specify locally. This program is built on an innovative technological tool that accomplishes conversion in an entirely safe manner. It works with all mbox support emails application like- AppleMail, Thunderbird, SeaMonkey, OperaMail, PocoMail, etc.
You can convert EML files to mbox for free by utilizing the demo version of this EML Converter, which is available for free download on its official websites. While converting your data to EML and MBOX, you can preview and scan the whole file. Use the filtering option to export only particular data. This program can be used for both official and commercial purposes, and it operates quickly without requiring the installation of Microsoft Outlook. It Convert without making any mistakes, Quick and easy conversion

Read More:- https://www.wholeclear.com/eml/mbox/
[read more]

item.title: GAME DOMAIN - NRGD [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GAME DOMAIN - NRGD [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAME DOMAIN - NRGD
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GAME DOMAIN Magisk Module by revWhiteShadow: Elevate Your Gaming Experience
The GAME DOMAIN Magisk Module which No Root users can use with shizuku , developed by revWhiteShadow, is a tribute to the anime world's dynamic power moves, inspired by Jujutsu Kaisen's "Domain Expansion." Just as Domain Expansion signifies an overwhelming force, the GAME DOMAIN module brings an unparalleled gaming experience to your Android device.

Game-Specific Kernel Tweaks: 30 Game Tweak Enhancements

GAME DOMAIN caters to a wide range of popular games, providing dedicated kernel tweaks to optimize your gaming sessions. Here are the 23 game-specific kernel tweaks that have been meticulously added:

1. PUBG Mobile (PUBGM)
2. Call of Duty: Mobile (CODM)
3. Genshin Impact
4. Free Fire
5. Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
6. Asphalt 9: Legends
7. Apex Legends Mobile
8. Arena of Valor
9. Critical Ops
10. Dead by Daylight Mobile
11. Mobile Legends: Adventure
12. Black Desert Mobile
13. Injustice 2
14. World War Heroes: WW2 FPS
15. Star Wars: Force Arena
16. Shadowgun Legends
17. Standoff 2
18. Battle Prime
19. Super Mecha Champions
20. Free Fire Max
21. PUBG Mobile Lite
22. Call of Duty: Warzone
23. Tanks A Lot! - Realtime Multiplayer Battle Arena
24. F1 Mobile Racing
25. Real Racing
26. BGMI (Battlegrounds Mobile India)
27. Arena Breakout
28. Minecraft
29. CARxSTREET
30. Diablo Immortal

GAME DOMAIN ensures that each game receives specific optimizations tailored to its requirements. Whether you're battling in the intense landscapes of PUBG Mobile, exploring the fantastical realm of Genshin Impact, or racing through the tracks of Real Racing, this module has you covered.

Revitalize your gaming sessions with GAME DOMAIN and experience the power of dedicated kernel tweaks that enhance performance, graphics, and overall gameplay. Elevate your gaming to the next level and embrace the Domain Expansion of your Android gaming experience.
[read more]

item.title: FAT Files Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: FAT Files Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ntfsfilerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
FAT Files Restore Software
(Utilities)
Screenshots recovery software is able to restore formatted screenshots, images, video and audio files lost due to disk formation process or OS error from FAT 32 hard disk partitioned in fewer clicks of mouse. FAT Files Restore Software is capable to retrieve damage pictures and screenshots misplaced due to improper cut/copy-paste operation or any similar reason of data loss from hard disk drive in less time requirement.

[read more]
item.description:
FAT Files Restore Software
(Utilities)
Screenshots recovery software is able to restore formatted screenshots, images, video and audio files lost due to disk formation process or OS error from FAT 32 hard disk partitioned in fewer clicks of mouse. FAT Files Restore Software is capable to retrieve damage pictures and screenshots misplaced due to improper cut/copy-paste operation or any similar reason of data loss from hard disk drive in less time requirement.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
FAT Files Restore Software
(Utilities)
Screenshots recovery software is able to restore formatted screenshots, images, video and audio files lost due to disk formation process or OS error from FAT 32 hard disk partitioned in fewer clicks of mouse. FAT Files Restore Software is capable to retrieve damage pictures and screenshots misplaced due to improper cut/copy-paste operation or any similar reason of data loss from hard disk drive in less time requirement.

item.title: Greeting Card Designing Software [Office Apps]

item.itunes:author: businessbarcode
item.itunes:summary:
Greeting Card Designing Software
(Office Apps)
www.businessbarcodes.org offers card developing software to generate beautiful cards for special events likes funny card, sorry card etc. Users develop decorative cards by using Greeting Card Designing Software in easiest way without any technical guidance and also have option to print excellent cards.

item.title: Digital Camera Photo Undelete Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Photo Undelete Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Photo Undelete Software
(Utilities)
Do you want to regain and restore formatted data that missing due to human mistake from various digital camera brands? Simple to use Digital Camera Photo Undelete Software is perfect and reliable solution to retrieve all missing snapshots, pictures, family photos, albums, digital images, audio-video clips etc from different type of camcorder device. Digital camera image rescue program allows users to restore lost or misplaced files saved in different graphic format from all major types of digital cameras.

[read more]
item.description:

Digital camera image rescue program allows users to restore lost or misplaced files saved in different graphic format from all major types of digital cameras.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Digital Camera Photo Undelete Software
(Utilities)
Do you want to regain and restore formatted data that missing due to human mistake from various digital camera brands? Simple to use Digital Camera Photo Undelete Software is perfect and reliable solution to retrieve all missing snapshots, pictures, family photos, albums, digital images, audio-video clips etc from different type of camcorder device. Digital camera image rescue program allows users to restore lost or misplaced files saved in different graphic format from all major types of digital cameras.

[read more]

item.title: calendar [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: calendar [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: chellom
item.itunes:summary:
calendar
(Office Apps)
It comprehensively features rich, some of its notable features include:
Supports multiple calendars and to-do lists.
Supports attachment of events and todos.
Quick event and to-do entry.
Undo and redo functions..
Alarm notifications.
Todo integration with agenda view...
Plugin for Jewish calendar dates.
Kontact integration.
Highly customizable.


Title: "Organize Your Life with Our Feature-Rich Calendar App"

Description:

Welcome to the next generation of calendar apps – the one-stop solution to streamline your life, enhance productivity, and stay on top of your commitments. Say goodbye to scattered schedules and hello to organized simplicity with our Calendar App.

Key Features:

1. **Seamless Scheduling**: Effortlessly plan your days, weeks, and months with a clean and intuitive interface that's easy to navigate. Our calendar app ensures you never miss an appointment or deadline.

2. **Custom Views**: Choose from a variety of views, including daily, weekly, monthly, and agenda, to adapt your calendar to your preferred perspective.

3. **Events and Reminders**: Set up and manage events, appointments, and reminders with just a few taps. Our app will keep you in the know about upcoming commitments.

4. **Sync Across Devices**: Stay in sync with your calendar across multiple devices, whether you're on your smartphone, tablet, or computer. Your schedule is always at your fingertips.

5. **Color Coding**: Keep your life organized and visually appealing by assigning colors to different events and categories. It's easy to distinguish between work, personal, and social commitments.

6. **Share and Collaborate**: Collaborate with family, friends, or colleagues by sharing specific calendars. Keep everyone in the loop, whether it's for family events, team projects, or social gatherings.

7. **Location and Maps Integration**: Easily add event locations and access maps for directions, making sure you never get lost on your way to an important meeting or event.

8. **Task Lists**: Seamlessly integrate task lists into your calendar, enabling you to manage your to-dos alongside your appointments and events. Stay on top of your tasks and priorities.

9. **Weather Updates**: Get real-time weather updates for your location right within the app, so you're always prepared for whatever Mother Nature has in store.

10. **Privacy and Security**: Rest easy knowing your data is secure with robust privacy settings. Your personal information is protected, and you have full control over who can access your calendar.

Our Calendar App is designed to be your indispensable scheduling and organization companion, whether you're a professional balancing work commitments, a parent managing family events, or simply someone who wants to make the most of their time.

Stay in control of your life and start organizing with ease. Buy our Calendar App today and experience a new level of efficiency, no matter how busy your schedule gets.
[read more]
item.description:
calendar
(Office Apps)

Supports attachment of events and todos.

7. **Location and Maps Integration**: Easily add event locations and access maps for directions, making sure you never get lost on your way to an important meeting or event.

8. **Task Lists**: Seamlessly integrate task lists into your calendar, enabling you to manage your to-dos alongside your appointments and events. Stay on top of your tasks and priorities.

9. **Weather Updates**: Get real-time weather updates for your location right within the app, so you're always prepared for whatever Mother Nature has in store.

10. **Privacy and Security**: Rest easy knowing your data is secure with robust privacy settings. Your personal information is protected, and you have full control over who can access your calendar.

Our Calendar App is designed to be your indispensable scheduling and organization companion, whether you're a professional balancing work commitments, a parent managing family events, or simply someone who wants to make the most of their time.

item.title: calculator [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: calculator [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: chellom
item.itunes:summary:
calculator
(Office Apps)
Title: "Calculate with Ease: Your Go-To Calculator App"
Description:.


Introducing the ultimate calculator app that redefines the way you crunch numbers and solve equations. Say goodbye to manual calculations and embrace the future of effortless mathematics. Whether you're a student, professional, or anyone in need of quick and accurate calculations, our Calculator App has you covered.
...
Key Features:
.
1. **Effortless Precision**: Our calculator app delivers unparalleled accuracy, ensuring that your calculations are always spot-on, whether you're working on complex equations or simple arithmetic.

2. **User-Friendly Interface**: Our intuitive, user-friendly design makes it easy for anyone to perform calculations. With a familiar layout, you'll feel right at home.

3. **Scientific Functions**: Need to tackle advanced math or scientific problems? No worries. Our calculator app includes a wide range of scientific functions, making it the perfect tool for students, engineers, and scientists.

4. **Graphing Capabilities**: Visualize your mathematical equations with our built-in graphing feature. Gain a deeper understanding of your data and functions with dynamic graphs.

5. **Unit Conversion**: Effortlessly convert between units such as length, weight, temperature, and more. Our calculator app provides a handy unit conversion tool, saving you time and effort.

6. **History & Memory**: Review your calculation history and access stored values for easy reference. Never lose track of your work or results again.

7. **Customizable Themes**: Personalize your calculator app with a variety of themes and color schemes to suit your style and preferences.

8. **Multi-Platform Compatibility**: Our calculator app is available for iOS and Android devices, ensuring you can carry a powerful calculator in your pocket wherever you go.

9. **No Ads, No Distractions**: Enjoy a clean, ad-free interface that lets you focus entirely on your calculations without any interruptions.

10. **Continuous Updates**: We're committed to providing regular updates to enhance and expand the functionality of our calculator app, ensuring you always have access to the latest features.

Whether you're a student solving complex math problems, an engineer working on critical projects, or a professional in need of quick and accurate calculations, our Calculator App is the all-in-one solution you've been looking for. Experience the future of mathematics at your fingertips.

Don't miss out on this opportunity to upgrade your mathematical toolkit. Buy our Calculator App today and simplify your calculations with precision and style!
[read more]
item.description:
calculator
(Office Apps)
Title: "Calculate with Ease: Your Go-To Calculator App"
Description:.


Introducing the ultimate calculator app that redefines the way you crunch numbers and solve equations. Say goodbye to manual calculations and embrace the future of effortless mathematics. Whether you're a student, professional, or anyone in need of quick and accurate calculations, our Calculator App has you covered.
...
Key Features:
.
1. **Effortless Precision**: Our calculator app delivers unparalleled accuracy, ensuring that your calculations are always spot-on, whether you're working on complex equations or simple arithmetic.

2. **User-Friendly Interface**: Our intuitive, user-friendly design makes it easy for anyone to perform calculations. With a familiar layout, you'll feel right at home.

3. **Scientific Functions**: Need to tackle advanced math or scientific problems? No worries. Our calculator app includes a wide range of scientific functions, making it the perfect tool for students, engineers, and scientists.

4. **Graphing Capabilities**: Visualize your mathematical equations with our built-in graphing feature. Gain a deeper understanding of your data and functions with dynamic graphs.

5. **Unit Conversion**: Effortlessly convert between units such as length, weight, temperature, and more. Our calculator app provides a handy unit conversion tool, saving you time and effort.

6. **History & Memory**: Review your calculation history and access stored values for easy reference. Never lose track of your work or results again.

7. **Customizable Themes**: Personalize your calculator app with a variety of themes and color schemes to suit your style and preferences.

8. **Multi-Platform Compatibility**: Our calculator app is available for iOS and Android devices, ensuring you can carry a powerful calculator in your pocket wherever you go.

9. **No Ads, No Distractions**: Enjoy a clean, ad-free interface that lets you focus entirely on your calculations without any interruptions.

10. **Continuous Updates**: We're committed to providing regular updates to enhance and expand the functionality of our calculator app, ensuring you always have access to the latest features.

Whether you're a student solving complex math problems, an engineer working on critical projects, or a professional in need of quick and accurate calculations, our Calculator App is the all-in-one solution you've been looking for. Experience the future of mathematics at your fingertips.

Don't miss out on this opportunity to upgrade your mathematical toolkit. Buy our Calculator App today and simplify your calculations with precision and style!

item.content:encoded:
calculator
(Office Apps)
Title: "Calculate with Ease: Your Go-To Calculator App"
Description:.


Introducing the ultimate calculator app that redefines the way you crunch numbers and solve equations. Say goodbye to manual calculations and embrace the future of effortless mathematics. Whether you're a student, professional, or anyone in need of quick and accurate calculations, our Calculator App has you covered.
...
Key Features:
.
1. **Effortless Precision**: Our calculator app delivers unparalleled accuracy, ensuring that your calculations are always spot-on, whether you're working on complex equations or simple arithmetic.

2. **User-Friendly Interface**: Our intuitive, user-friendly design makes it easy for anyone to perform calculations. With a familiar layout, you'll feel right at home.

3. **Scientific Functions**: Need to tackle advanced math or scientific problems? No worries. Our calculator app includes a wide range of scientific functions, making it the perfect tool for students, engineers, and scientists.

4. **Graphing Capabilities**: Visualize your mathematical equations with our built-in graphing feature. Gain a deeper understanding of your data and functions with dynamic graphs.

5. **Unit Conversion**: Effortlessly convert between units such as length, weight, temperature, and more. Our calculator app provides a handy unit conversion tool, saving you time and effort.

6. **History & Memory**: Review your calculation history and access stored values for easy reference. Never lose track of your work or results again.

7. **Customizable Themes**: Personalize your calculator app with a variety of themes and color schemes to suit your style and preferences.

8. **Multi-Platform Compatibility**: Our calculator app is available for iOS and Android devices, ensuring you can carry a powerful calculator in your pocket wherever you go.

9. **No Ads, No Distractions**: Enjoy a clean, ad-free interface that lets you focus entirely on your calculations without any interruptions.

10. **Continuous Updates**: We're committed to providing regular updates to enhance and expand the functionality of our calculator app, ensuring you always have access to the latest features.

Whether you're a student solving complex math problems, an engineer working on critical projects, or a professional in need of quick and accurate calculations, our Calculator App is the all-in-one solution you've been looking for. Experience the future of mathematics at your fingertips.

Don't miss out on this opportunity to upgrade your mathematical toolkit. Buy our Calculator App today and simplify your calculations with precision and style!
